details: The agent ran appropriate commands but produced incorrect results. The known correct tags are v2026.3.13-1, v2026.3.13-beta.1, and v2026.3.12, but the agent reported v2026.3.23, v2026.3.22, and v2026.3.22-beta.1. The agent misinterpreted or incorrectly extracted the data from the tool output file.
